subject: Derivatives Portfolio Mark-to-Market Report
body:
Risk Management Team,

Daily mark-to-market report for our derivatives positions as of March 18, 2026:

Interest Rate Swaps:
- Notional: $50M pay-fixed/receive-floating
- Fixed rate: 3.85%
- Current SOFR: 4.25%
- MTM Value: +$1.2M (favorable)
- Duration: 2.3 years remaining

FX Forwards:
- EUR/USD: €4.2M at 1.0845, current spot 1.0920, MTM: -$31K
- GBP/USD: £1.8M at 1.2750, current spot 1.2810, MTM: -$11K

Commodity Hedges:
- Natural gas (data center): 50K MMBtu at $3.20, market $3.45, MTM: -$12.5K

Total Portfolio MTM: +$1.15M
Collateral Posted: $500K (well within ISDA threshold)
Counterparty Credit Exposure: JPMorgan Chase (AA-rated)

VaR (95%, 1-day): $85K
VaR (99%, 1-day): $142K

No margin calls expected. All positions within approved limits.

Next hedge roll dates:
- EUR forwards: April 15
- GBP forwards: May 1

Recommendation: Consider extending swap duration given inverted curve expectations.
